title: Superior Large Foil Aluminium Trays Pack of 10 – Heavy-Duty Deep Tin Foil Trays 32 x 26 cm Ideal for Cooking Baking Roasting BBQ Meal Prep Storage Tray – Foil Containers for Christmas Parties
features: Generous Capacity: Superior Pack of 10 foil containers accommodates four to six servings per container with their 9x13x7 inches size, making it perfect for meal prepping large portions or freezing lasagna, casseroles, and more

Sturdy, Leak-Resistant Design: These foil baking trays are built to hold their shape and prevent leaks, ensuring that your baked goods remain intact during baking, storage, or transport. Perfect for hassle-free pie baking and serving without the need for lids

Durable Construction: These premium-grade disposable food containers are designed to handle even the heaviest meals without bending or crumpling. Ideal large foil trays for curries, stews, and other hearty dishes, they maintain their shape under pressure

Freezer-Safe and Oven-Ready: Designed to handle temperature extremes, these aluminum foil trays can go directly from freezer to oven. Perfect foil trays for baking for reheating meals without any transfer, saving you time and effort

Multi-Purpose Versatility: Whether it’s for meal prepping, storing leftovers, or freezing meals in advance, these sturdy foil trays for party food are ideal for a wide range of dishes, from curries to casseroles and everything in between. Perfect for home kitchens, catering, or meal prep businesses
